items.title: More than 200 rescued from IS-linked group in DR Congo
items.dek: The youngest of those freed from an Allied Democratic Forces camp is a girl aged just 14, Uganda's army says.
items.body: The youngest of those freed from an Allied Democratic Forces camp is a girl aged just 14, Uganda's army says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Days of Our Lives and Starship Troopers actor Patrick Muldoon dies aged 57
items.dek: The actor and producer also appeared in Melrose Place and Saved By the Bell.
items.body: The actor and producer also appeared in Melrose Place and Saved By the Bell.

items.title: Trump tariff refunds begin but consumers likely to miss out
items.dek: Businesses can apply online through a portal for refunds expected to total $160bn.
items.body: Businesses can apply online through a portal for refunds expected to total $160bn.
